query:
insert into photos
            (id, owner_id, storage_key, original_name, bytes, mime, status,
             last_step, short_id, original_hash, pipeline_error, original_uploaded_at)
         values ($1, $2, $3, 'frame.jpg', 1000, 'image/jpeg', 'failed',
                 'upload', $4, $5, 'decode failed', now())
